response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-relevant tools, plus strong architecture and DevOps exposure, but his seniority level (Staff/Senior roles for over a decade) vastly exceeds the junior/mid-level requirement, and his German language skill is only basic despite high on-site presence being required.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven full-stack ownership from database to UI with clean architecture focus
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK)
concerns: Overqualified with 10+ years of senior-level experience, risking misalignment with junior role expectations
German language proficiency is only basic, conflicting with high on-site collaboration needs
Extensive use of DLang and niche tools may indicate preference for unconventional stacks over pragmatic enterprise needs
